message:
fix(vfs): preserve shared SHM state on unmap with delete flag while other owners remain

Match SQLite's xShmUnmap(deleteFlag) semantics: the shared SHM backing
store must only be removed when the last owner unmaps, not when any
single owner passes delete=true. Previously, shm_unmap with delete=true
would unconditionally remove the shared state, causing other connections
sharing the same SHM node to lose data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
